response: During the 2024-25 NBA season, 40-year-old Los Angeles Lakers star LeBron James suited up for 71 total games and earned a well-deserved spot as an All-Star, highlighting his unwavering elite performance deep into his historic career. Across those 71 appearances, he posted impressive, well-rounded per-game averages of 28.4 points, 7.2 rebounds, and 8.1 assists, a stat line that defies typical expectations for veteran players and cements his status as one of the league’s most enduring talents.
